## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthX feedback and performance review with Carmel Schetrit from Siit](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit has seen traffic growth but struggles with engagement metrics and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX needs to provide more actionable data insights and adapt strategies more quickly](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Carmel seeks a more data-driven approach to content strategy and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Siit is considering broadening its messaging beyond IT-specific focus to drive growth](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Onboarding and Initial Performance

  - [Carmel started with GrowthX in January 2025](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Initial goals: generate more quality traffic and leads (top-of-funnel demand capture)](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Onboarding process was well-organized but time-consuming for content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Early challenges: AI-generated content lacked factual accuracy and business understanding](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Current output pace is satisfactory; team is responsive and productive](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Traffic has grown, but time on site has decreased](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Lead generation hasn't improved significantly](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Shifting focus to more bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) content like downloadable guides](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Need for better alignment between content format and strategic goals (e.g., making guides more actionable and technical)](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Data and Analytics Gap

  - [Lack of comprehensive data insights is a major pain point](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Current weekly reports lack actionable insights on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Desire for funnel analysis, user journey mapping, and top-performing content metrics](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Previous attempts at custom Google Analytics views were helpful but not sustained](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Business Context and Challenges

  - [Siit operates in the internal service desk space, focusing on IT and ITSM](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Facing competition from established players in a crowded market](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [High closing rate for trials/demos, but struggling to drive quality traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Considering broadening messaging beyond IT-specific focus to expand market reach](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Channel Performance

  - [Direct inbound: highest volume of leads](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Outbound sales: largest deal sizes](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Paid ads: underperforming, exploring new strategies (e.g., Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)

### Technical Limitations

  - [Current Webflow setup lacks flexibility for creating custom, polished content assets](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Desire for more sophisticated design capabilities to enhance content presentation](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up deep dive session in a few weeks to present ideas and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop a 3-6 month plan addressing learnings and proposed improvements](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Involve Jacob (GrowthX team member) more closely to leverage his data-driven approach](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Explore options for enhancing design capabilities within Webflow constraints](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Implement more robust data tracking and develop actionable performance insights](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Map out ideal user journeys and develop hypotheses for optimizing conversion paths](https://fathom.video/share/1_vAJV5SeG4BF35tqLuamDje4Ge4S1ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
